title: Simon Says Stamp + KP Blog Hop
excerpt: A happy and complete Project Life spread seems like the perfect way to kick off the week. I just adore Kelly Purkey and feel lucky to call her a friend. She even flew in this past weekend for my baby…
body:
A happy and complete Project Life spread seems like the perfect way to kick off the week. I just adore Kelly Purkey and feel lucky to call her a friend. She even flew in this past weekend for my baby shower.We were laughing because she was a bit concerned that you wouldn't be able to see my belly. Umm, not sure how you could miss it at this point ;)So yes, we have a lot of fun together and I certainly have fun with all of Kelly Purkey's products.

When I get the box every other month from Simon Says Stamp, I always get excited and want to take a look at the contents. With just enough room cleared off my desk, spread it all out.

GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED: Simon will be giving away a $25.00 Gift Certificate to one commenter on every blog in the hop, which is 11 different chances to win! Just leave a comment about something fun. The giveaways for the GC's will close at 6:00pm EST on Sunday August 25, 2013 and a complete winners list will be posted on the Simon blog on Monday August 26, 2013 - here is the list. Congrats to Angie Blom!

Next stop on the hop - Jennifer McGuire
